Adam Bell is a mild mannered history professor with a beautiful girlfriend. Though he seems listless and exhausted by his repetitive existence. Adams life changes when he notices that an actor in a film he's watching looks exactly like him. Shocked and sad. Garrett Adam locates and approaches Anthony, his seeming doppelganger. Although they look and sound identical, Anthony is charming, funny and explosive. While Adam is shy, afraid and weak. Adam unravels as he has drawn deeper into Anthony's life. And as Anthony begins taking over his will Adam find his own independence, or will he be trapped as just a reflection of his own? Enemy?
